headline: Payrolls Reset The Fed Debate
summary: S&P 500 and Nasdaq snapped a 9-week rally as jobs data lifted yields and Fed hike odds. Read the full analysis here.

headline: Assessing Prologis (PLD) Valuation After Strong 1-Year Returns And Premium P/E Multiple
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Prologis (PLD) Prologis (PLD) recently closed at $144.54, with the stock showing modest moves over the past week and month, as well as a stronger total return profile over the past year and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Prologis. Recent moves in Prologis’s share price have been relatively steady. However, the 90-day share price return of 6.95% and 1-year total shareholder return of 37.48% point to momentum that has been building rather than...
